    59вҶ’## 4.2 Ingestion Service
    60вҶ’
    61вҶ’### 4.2.1 Purpose
    62вҶ’
    63вҶ’Process daily CSV files containing mileage data, validate records, handle meter events, and update the database.
    64вҶ’
    65вҶ’### 4.2.2 File Watcher
    66вҶ’
    67вҶ’```typescript
    68вҶ’interface FileWatcherConfig {
    69вҶ’  inboxPath: string;           // /data/inbox
    70вҶ’  processedPath: string;       // /data/processed
    71вҶ’  quarantinePath: string;      // /data/quarantine
    72вҶ’  expectedFilePattern: RegExp; // /^mileage_\d{8}\.csv$/
    73вҶ’  maxFileSizeBytes: number;    // 10MB
    74вҶ’  alertThresholdHours: number; // 2
    75вҶ’}
    76вҶ’
    77вҶ’class FileWatcherService {
    78вҶ’  private watcher: FSWatcher;
    79вҶ’  private lastFileReceivedAt: Date | null = null;
    80вҶ’  
    81вҶ’  async start(): Promise<void> {
    82вҶ’    this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.config.inboxPath, {
    83вҶ’      persistent: true,
    84вҶ’      awaitWriteFinish: { stabilityThreshold: 2000, pollInterval: 500 }
    85вҶ’    });
    86вҶ’    
    87вҶ’    this.watcher.on('add', async (filePath) => {
    88вҶ’      this.lastFileReceivedAt = new Date();
    89вҶ’      await this.processFile(filePath);
    90вҶ’    });
    91вҶ’    
    92вҶ’    // Health check interval
    93вҶ’    setInterval(() => this.checkFileArrivalHealth(), 30 * 60 * 1000);
    94вҶ’  }
    95вҶ’  
    96вҶ’  private async processFile(filePath: string): Promise<void> {
    97вҶ’    const filename = path.basename(filePath);
    98вҶ’    const jobId = crypto.randomUUID();
    99вҶ’    
   100вҶ’    try {
   101вҶ’      // Validate file
   102вҶ’      await this.validateFile(filePath);
   103вҶ’      
   104вҶ’      // Queue for processing
   105вҶ’      await this.jobQueue.add('ingestion', {
   106вҶ’        jobId,
   107вҶ’        filePath,
   108вҶ’        filename,
   109вҶ’        receivedAt: new Date().toISOString()
   110вҶ’      }, {
   111вҶ’        attempts: 3,
   112вҶ’        backoff: { type: 'exponential', delay: 5000 }
   113вҶ’      });
   114вҶ’      
   115вҶ’      this.logger.info({ jobId, filename }, 'File queued for ingestion');
   116вҶ’      
   117вҶ’    } catch (error) {
   118вҶ’      // Move to quarantine
   119вҶ’      const quarantinePath = path.join(
   120вҶ’        this.config.quarantinePath, 
   121вҶ’        `${Date.now()}_${filename}`
   122вҶ’      );
   123вҶ’      await fs.rename(filePath, quarantinePath);
   124вҶ’      
   125вҶ’      this.logger.error({ filename, error }, 'File quarantined');
   126вҶ’      
   127вҶ’      await this.alertService.send({
   128вҶ’        type: 'FILE_VALIDATION_FAILED',
   129вҶ’        severity: 'WARNING',
   130вҶ’        message: `File ${filename} failed validation: ${error.message}`,
   131вҶ’        filePath: quarantinePath
   132вҶ’      });
   133вҶ’    }
   134вҶ’  }
   135вҶ’  
   136вҶ’  private async validateFile(filePath: string): Promise<void> {
   137вҶ’    const stats = await fs.stat(filePath);
   138вҶ’    
   139вҶ’    // Size check
   140вҶ’    if (stats.size > this.config.maxFileSizeBytes) {
   141вҶ’      throw new Error(`File exceeds maximum size: ${stats.size} bytes`);
   142вҶ’    }
   143вҶ’    
   144вҶ’    // Format check
   145вҶ’    const filename = path.basename(filePath);
   146вҶ’    if (!this.config.expectedFilePattern.test(filename)) {
   147вҶ’      throw new Error(`Filename does not match expected pattern: ${filename}`);
   148вҶ’    }
   149вҶ’    
   150вҶ’    // Content check (first 10 lines)
   151вҶ’    const sample = await this.readFirstLines(filePath, 10);
   152вҶ’    await this.validateCSVStructure(sample);
   153вҶ’  }
   154вҶ’  
   155вҶ’  private async checkFileArrivalHealth(): Promise<void> {
   156вҶ’    if (!this.lastFileReceivedAt) return;
   157вҶ’    
   158вҶ’    const hoursSinceLastFile = 
   159вҶ’      (Date.now() - this.lastFileReceivedAt.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
   160вҶ’    
   161вҶ’    if (hoursSinceLastFile > this.config.alertThresholdHours) {
   162вҶ’      await this.alertService.send({
   163вҶ’        type: 'FILE_ARRIVAL_DELAYED',
   164вҶ’        severity: 'WARNING',
   165вҶ’        message: `No mileage files received in ${hoursSinceLastFile.toFixed(1)} hours`,
   166вҶ’        lastFileAt: this.lastFileReceivedAt.toISOString(),
   167вҶ’        expectedInterval: `${this.config.alertThresholdHours} hours`
   168вҶ’      });
   169вҶ’    }
   170вҶ’  }
   171вҶ’}
   172вҶ’```
   173вҶ’
   174вҶ’### 4.2.3 Ingestion Worker
   175вҶ’
   176вҶ’```typescript
   177вҶ’interface MileageRecord {
   178вҶ’  trainNumber: string;
   179вҶ’  readingDate: string;  // YYYY-MM-DD
   180вҶ’  odometerValue: number;
   181вҶ’  source?: string;
   182вҶ’}
   183вҶ’
   184вҶ’interface IngestionResult {
   185вҶ’  jobId: string;
   186вҶ’  filename: string;
   187вҶ’  totalRecords: number;
   188вҶ’  validRecords: number;
   189вҶ’  invalidRecords: number;
   190вҶ’  anomalies: AnomalyRecord[];
   191вҶ’  meterEvents: MeterEventRecord[];
   192вҶ’  processingTimeMs: number;
   193вҶ’}
   194вҶ’
   195вҶ’class IngestionWorker {
   196вҶ’  async process(job: Job<IngestionJobData>): Promise<IngestionResult> {
   197вҶ’    const startTime = Date.now();
   198вҶ’    const { jobId, filePath, filename } = job.data;
   199вҶ’    
   200вҶ’    const result: IngestionResult = {
   201вҶ’      jobId,
   202вҶ’      filename,
   203вҶ’      totalRecords: 0,
   204вҶ’      validRecords: 0,
   205вҶ’      invalidRecords: 0,
   206вҶ’      anomalies: [],
   207вҶ’      meterEvents: [],
   208вҶ’      processingTimeMs: 0
   209вҶ’    };
   210вҶ’    
   211вҶ’    // Parse CSV
   212вҶ’    const records = await this.parseCSV(filePath);
   213вҶ’    result.totalRecords = records.length;
   214вҶ’    
   215вҶ’    // Process in batches
   216вҶ’    const batches = this.chunk(records, 100);
   217вҶ’    
   218вҶ’    for (const batch of batches) {
   219вҶ’      await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
   220вҶ’        for (const record of batch) {
   221вҶ’          try {
   222вҶ’            await this.processRecord(tx, record, result);
   223вҶ’            result.validRecords++;
   224вҶ’          } catch (error) {
   225вҶ’            result.invalidRecords++;
   226вҶ’            this.logger.warn({ record, error }, 'Record processing failed');
   227вҶ’          }
   228вҶ’        }
   229вҶ’      });
   230вҶ’    }
   231вҶ’    
   232вҶ’    // Move file to processed
   233вҶ’    const processedPath = path.join(
   234вҶ’      this.config.processedPath,
   235вҶ’      `${Date.now()}_${filename}`
   236вҶ’    );
   237вҶ’    await fs.rename(filePath, processedPath);
   238вҶ’    
   239вҶ’    // Update train current mileage
   240вҶ’    await this.updateTrainMileage(records);
   241вҶ’    
   242вҶ’    // Trigger downstream processing
   243вҶ’    await this.triggerDriftCheck();
   244вҶ’    
   245вҶ’    result.processingTimeMs = Date.now() - startTime;
   246вҶ’    
   247вҶ’    return result;
   248вҶ’  }
   249вҶ’  
   250вҶ’  private async processRecord(
   251вҶ’    tx: Transaction,
   252вҶ’    record: MileageRecord,
   253вҶ’    result: IngestionResult
   254вҶ’  ): Promise<void> {
   255вҶ’    // Find train
   256вҶ’    const train = await tx.query.trains.findFirst({
   257вҶ’      where: eq(trains.trainNumber, record.trainNumber)
   258вҶ’    });
   259вҶ’    
   260вҶ’    if (!train) {
   261вҶ’      throw new Error(`Unknown train: ${record.trainNumber}`);
   262вҶ’    }
   263вҶ’    
   264вҶ’    // Get previous reading
   265вҶ’    const previousReading = await tx.query.mileageReadings.findFirst({
   266вҶ’      where: and(
   267вҶ’        eq(mileageReadings.trainId, train.id),
   268вҶ’        lt(mileageReadings.readingDate, record.readingDate)
   269вҶ’      ),
   270вҶ’      orderBy: desc(mileageReadings.readingDate)
   271вҶ’    });
   272вҶ’    
   273вҶ’    // Calculate adjusted value (handle meter events)
   274вҶ’    const adjustment = await this.getMeterAdjustment(tx, train.id, record.readingDate);
   275вҶ’    const adjustedReading = record.odometerValue + adjustment;
   276вҶ’    
   277вҶ’    // Calculate daily km
   278вҶ’    let dailyKm: number | null = null;
   279вҶ’    let anomalyType: string | null = null;
   280вҶ’    
   281вҶ’    if (previousReading) {
   282вҶ’      dailyKm = adjustedReading - previousReading.adjustedReading;
   283вҶ’      
   284вҶ’      // Anomaly detection
   285вҶ’      if (dailyKm < 0) {
   286вҶ’        anomalyType = 'NEGATIVE';
   287вҶ’        result.anomalies.push({
   288вҶ’          trainNumber: record.trainNumber,
   289вҶ’          date: record.readingDate,
   290вҶ’          type: 'NEGATIVE',
   291вҶ’          value: dailyKm,
   292вҶ’          message: `Negative daily mileage: ${dailyKm} km`
   293вҶ’        });
   294вҶ’      } else if (dailyKm > 1000) {  // Spike threshold
   295вҶ’        anomalyType = 'SPIKE';
   296вҶ’        result.anomalies.push({
   297вҶ’          trainNumber: record.trainNumber,
   298вҶ’          date: record.readingDate,
   299вҶ’          type: 'SPIKE',
   300вҶ’          value: dailyKm,
   301вҶ’          message: `Unusually high daily mileage: ${dailyKm} km`
   302вҶ’        });
   303вҶ’      }
   304вҶ’    }
   305вҶ’    
   306вҶ’    // Insert or update reading
   307вҶ’    await tx.insert(mileageReadings)
   308вҶ’      .values({
   309вҶ’        trainId: train.id,
   310вҶ’        readingDate: record.readingDate,
   311вҶ’        rawReading: record.odometerValue,
   312вҶ’        adjustedReading,
   313вҶ’        dailyKm,
   314вҶ’        validationStatus: anomalyType ? 'ANOMALY' : 'VALID',
   315вҶ’        anomalyType,
   316вҶ’        sourceFile: result.filename
   317вҶ’      })
   318вҶ’      .onConflictDoUpdate({
   319вҶ’        target: [mileageReadings.trainId, mileageReadings.readingDate],
   320вҶ’        set: {
   321вҶ’          rawReading: record.odometerValue,
   322вҶ’          adjustedReading,
   323вҶ’          dailyKm,
   324вҶ’          validationStatus: anomalyType ? 'ANOMALY' : 'VALID',
   325вҶ’          anomalyType,
   326вҶ’          sourceFile: result.filename
   327вҶ’        }
   328вҶ’      });
   329вҶ’  }
   330вҶ’  
   331вҶ’  private async getMeterAdjustment(
   332вҶ’    tx: Transaction,
   333вҶ’    trainId: string,
   334вҶ’    asOfDate: string
   335вҶ’  ): Promise<number> {
   336вҶ’    // Sum all meter event adjustments up to this date
   337вҶ’    const events = await tx.query.meterEvents.findMany({
   338вҶ’      where: and(
   339вҶ’        eq(meterEvents.trainId, trainId),
   340вҶ’        lte(meterEvents.eventDate, asOfDate)
   341вҶ’      )
   342вҶ’    });
   343вҶ’    
   344вҶ’    return events.reduce((sum, e) => sum + (e.adjustmentKm || 0), 0);
   345вҶ’  }
   346вҶ’  
   347вҶ’  private async updateTrainMileage(records: MileageRecord[]): Promise<void> {
   348вҶ’    // Group by train, find latest reading
   349вҶ’    const latestByTrain = new Map<string, MileageRecord>();
   350вҶ’    
   351вҶ’    for (const record of records) {
   352вҶ’      const existing = latestByTrain.get(record.trainNumber);
   353вҶ’      if (!existing || record.readingDate > existing.readingDate) {
   354вҶ’        latestByTrain.set(record.trainNumber, record);
   355вҶ’      }
   356вҶ’    }
   357вҶ’    
   358вҶ’    // Update train current_mileage
   359вҶ’    for (const [trainNumber, record] of latestByTrain) {
   360вҶ’      await this.db.update(trains)
   361вҶ’        .set({ 
   362вҶ’          currentMileageKm: record.odometerValue,
   363вҶ’          updatedAt: new Date()
   364вҶ’        })
   365вҶ’        .where(eq(trains.trainNumber, trainNumber));
   366вҶ’    }
   367вҶ’    
   368вҶ’    // Update fleet mileage targets
   369вҶ’    await this.db.execute(sql`SELECT update_fleet_mileage_targets()`);
   370вҶ’  }
   371вҶ’}
   372вҶ’```
   373вҶ’
   374вҶ’---
   375вҶ’
   376вҶ’## 4.2.5 Unavailability Service (NEW v2.1)
   377вҶ’
   378вҶ’### 4.2.5.1 Purpose
   379вҶ’
   380вҶ’Track trains that are unavailable due to corrective maintenance, incidents, or other blocking factors. This service is **critical** for schedule validity - without it, the optimizer can schedule PMs for trains that are grounded for weeks.
   381вҶ’
   382вҶ’### 4.2.5.2 Implementation
   383вҶ’
   384вҶ’```typescript
   385вҶ’interface UnavailabilityEvent {
   386вҶ’  id: string;
   387вҶ’  trainId: string;
   388вҶ’  eventType: 'CORRECTIVE' | 'INCIDENT' | 'COLLISION' | 'VANDALISM' | 'EXTERNAL' | 'PLANNED_OUTAGE';
   389вҶ’  status: 'ACTIVE' | 'RESOLVED';
   390вҶ’  restrictionLevel: 'RESTRICTED' | 'GROUNDED';
   391вҶ’  
   392вҶ’  reportedAt: Date;
   393вҶ’  estimatedRepairHours?: number;
   394вҶ’  estimatedReturnDate?: Date;
   395вҶ’  actualReturnDate?: Date;
   396вҶ’  
   397вҶ’  sourceSystem: 'MAXIMO' | 'OCC' | 'MANUAL';
   398вҶ’  externalReference?: string;   // Maximo WO number
   399вҶ’  externalStatus?: string;      // Maximo status
   400вҶ’  
   401вҶ’  description?: string;
   402вҶ’  failureCode?: string;
   403вҶ’  affectedSystem?: string;
   404вҶ’  
   405вҶ’  blocksPmScheduling: boolean;
   406вҶ’  blocksRunAssignment: boolean;
   407вҶ’}
   408вҶ’
   409вҶ’interface CreateUnavailabilityInput {
   410вҶ’  trainId: string;
   411вҶ’  eventType: UnavailabilityEvent['eventType'];
   412вҶ’  restrictionLevel: UnavailabilityEvent['restrictionLevel'];
   413вҶ’  estimatedReturnDate?: Date;
   414вҶ’  estimatedRepairHours?: number;
   415вҶ’  sourceSystem: UnavailabilityEvent['sourceSystem'];
   416вҶ’  externalReference?: string;
   417вҶ’  description?: string;
   418вҶ’  affectedSystem?: string;
   419вҶ’}
   420вҶ’
   421вҶ’class UnavailabilityService {
   422вҶ’  constructor(
   423вҶ’    private db: Database,
   424вҶ’    private alertService: AlertService,
   425вҶ’    private auditService: AuditService
   426вҶ’  ) {}
   427вҶ’  
   428вҶ’  /**
   429вҶ’   * Create a new unavailability event (e.g., from Maximo webhook)
   430вҶ’   */
   431вҶ’  async createEvent(input: CreateUnavailabilityInput, userId?: string): Promise<UnavailabilityEvent> {
   432вҶ’    const event = await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
   433вҶ’      // 1. Create the unavailability event
   434вҶ’      const [newEvent] = await tx
   435вҶ’        .insert(unavailabilityEvents)
   436вҶ’        .values({
   437вҶ’          ...input,
   438вҶ’          status: 'ACTIVE',
   439вҶ’          reportedAt: new Date(),
   440вҶ’          blocksPmScheduling: true,
   441вҶ’          blocksRunAssignment: input.restrictionLevel === 'GROUNDED',
   442вҶ’        })
   443вҶ’        .returning();
   444вҶ’      
   445вҶ’      // 2. Update train fitness status (trigger handles this, but we can be explicit)
   446вҶ’      await tx
   447вҶ’        .update(trains)
   448вҶ’        .set({
   449вҶ’          fitnessStatus: input.restrictionLevel,
   450вҶ’          fitnessNotes: input.description || `Unavailability: ${input.eventType}`,
   451вҶ’          updatedAt: new Date()
   452вҶ’        })
   453вҶ’        .where(eq(trains.id, input.trainId));
   454вҶ’      
   455вҶ’      // 3. Check for conflicts with scheduled PMs
   456вҶ’      const conflicts = await this.checkPMConflicts(tx, input.trainId, input.estimatedReturnDate);
   457вҶ’      
   458вҶ’      return { event: newEvent, conflicts };
   459вҶ’    });
   460вҶ’    
   461вҶ’    // Alert if PM conflicts exist
   462вҶ’    if (event.conflicts.length > 0) {
   463вҶ’      await this.alertService.send({
   464вҶ’        type: 'UNAVAILABILITY_PM_CONFLICT',
   465вҶ’        severity: 'WARNING',
   466вҶ’        message: `Train ${event.event.trainId} unavailable - ${event.conflicts.length} scheduled PMs may be affected`,
   467вҶ’        data: {
   468вҶ’          trainId: event.event.trainId,
   469вҶ’          eventId: event.event.id,
   470вҶ’          conflictingPMs: event.conflicts.map(pm => ({
   471вҶ’            pmId: pm.id,
   472вҶ’            pmType: pm.pmTypeCode,
   473вҶ’            targetDate: pm.targetDate
   474вҶ’          }))
   475вҶ’        }
   476вҶ’      });
   477вҶ’    }
   478вҶ’    
   479вҶ’    // Audit log
   480вҶ’    await this.auditService.log({
   481вҶ’      entityType: 'unavailability_event',
   482вҶ’      entityId: event.event.id,
   483вҶ’      action: 'CREATE',
   484вҶ’      userId,
   485вҶ’      newValues: event.event
   486вҶ’    });
   487вҶ’    
   488вҶ’    return event.event;
   489вҶ’  }
   490вҶ’  
   491вҶ’  /**
   492вҶ’   * Resolve an unavailability event (train returns to service)
   493вҶ’   */
   494вҶ’  async resolveEvent(
   495вҶ’    eventId: string, 
   496вҶ’    actualReturnDate: Date, 
   497вҶ’    userId: string,
   498вҶ’    notes?: string
   499вҶ’  ): Promise<void> {
   500вҶ’    await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
   501вҶ’      const [event] = await tx
   502вҶ’        .select()
   503вҶ’        .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   504вҶ’        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId));
   505вҶ’      
   506вҶ’      if (!event) {
   507вҶ’        throw new NotFoundError(`Unavailability event ${eventId} not found`);
   508вҶ’      }
   509вҶ’      
   510вҶ’      if (event.status === 'RESOLVED') {
   511вҶ’        throw new ConflictError('Event already resolved');
   512вҶ’      }
   513вҶ’      
   514вҶ’      // Update the event
   515вҶ’      await tx
   516вҶ’        .update(unavailabilityEvents)
   517вҶ’        .set({
   518вҶ’          status: 'RESOLVED',
   519вҶ’          actualReturnDate,
   520вҶ’          resolvedAt: new Date(),
   521вҶ’          resolvedBy: userId,
   522вҶ’          resolutionNotes: notes,
   523вҶ’          updatedAt: new Date()
   524вҶ’        })
   525вҶ’        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId));
   526вҶ’      
   527вҶ’      // Check if there are other active unavailability events for this train
   528вҶ’      const otherActive = await tx
   529вҶ’        .select({ count: count() })
   530вҶ’        .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   531вҶ’        .where(and(
   532вҶ’          eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, event.trainId),
   533вҶ’          eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'),
   534вҶ’          ne(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId)
   535вҶ’        ));
   536вҶ’      
   537вҶ’      // If no other active events, restore train to FIT
   538вҶ’      if (otherActive[0].count === 0) {
   539вҶ’        await tx
   540вҶ’          .update(trains)
   541вҶ’          .set({
   542вҶ’            fitnessStatus: 'FIT',
   543вҶ’            fitnessNotes: null,
   544вҶ’            updatedAt: new Date()
   545вҶ’          })
   546вҶ’          .where(eq(trains.id, event.trainId));
   547вҶ’      }
   548вҶ’    });
   549вҶ’    
   550вҶ’    await this.auditService.log({
   551вҶ’      entityType: 'unavailability_event',
   552вҶ’      entityId: eventId,
   553вҶ’      action: 'RESOLVE',
   554вҶ’      userId,
   555вҶ’      newValues: { status: 'RESOLVED', actualReturnDate }
   556вҶ’    });
   557вҶ’  }
   558вҶ’  
   559вҶ’  /**
   560вҶ’   * Get all active unavailability events (for optimizer input)
   561вҶ’   */
   562вҶ’  async getActiveUnavailability(depotId?: string): Promise<UnavailabilityEvent[]> {
   563вҶ’    let query = this.db
   564вҶ’      .select({
   565вҶ’        event: unavailabilityEvents,
   566вҶ’        train: {
   567вҶ’          trainNumber: trains.trainNumber,
   568вҶ’          fleetId: trains.fleetId,
   569вҶ’          currentDepotId: trains.currentDepotId
   570вҶ’        }
   571вҶ’      })
   572вҶ’      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   573вҶ’      .innerJoin(trains, eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, trains.id))
   574вҶ’      .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'));
   575вҶ’    
   576вҶ’    if (depotId) {
   577вҶ’      query = query.where(eq(trains.currentDepotId, depotId));
   578вҶ’    }
   579вҶ’    
   580вҶ’    const results = await query;
   581вҶ’    return results.map(r => ({
   582вҶ’      ...r.event,
   583вҶ’      trainNumber: r.train.trainNumber,
   584вҶ’      fleetId: r.train.fleetId
   585вҶ’    }));
   586вҶ’  }
   587вҶ’  
   588вҶ’  /**
   589вҶ’   * Check if a specific train is available on a specific date
   590вҶ’   */
   591вҶ’  async isTrainAvailable(trainId: string, targetDate: Date): Promise<{
   592вҶ’    available: boolean;
   593вҶ’    blockingEvent?: UnavailabilityEvent;
   594вҶ’  }> {
   595вҶ’    const activeEvents = await this.db
   596вҶ’      .select()
   597вҶ’      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   598вҶ’      .where(and(
   599вҶ’        eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, trainId),
   600вҶ’        eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'),
   601вҶ’        or(
   602вҶ’          isNull(unavailabilityEvents.estimatedReturnDate),
   603вҶ’          gte(unavailabilityEvents.estimatedReturnDate, targetDate)
   604вҶ’        )
   605вҶ’      ))
   606вҶ’      .limit(1);
   607вҶ’    
   608вҶ’    if (activeEvents.length > 0) {
   609вҶ’      return { available: false, blockingEvent: activeEvents[0] };
   610вҶ’    }
   611вҶ’    
   612вҶ’    return { available: true };
   613вҶ’  }
   614вҶ’  
   615вҶ’  /**
   616вҶ’   * Process Maximo webhook for work order status change
   617вҶ’   */
   618вҶ’  async processMaximoWebhook(payload: MaximoWorkOrderWebhook): Promise<void> {
   619вҶ’    // Map Maximo work types to our event types
   620вҶ’    const eventTypeMap: Record<string, UnavailabilityEvent['eventType']> = {
   621вҶ’      'CM': 'CORRECTIVE',
   622вҶ’      'EM': 'CORRECTIVE',  // Emergency maintenance
   623вҶ’      'IN': 'INCIDENT'
   624вҶ’    };
   625вҶ’    
   626вҶ’    if (!eventTypeMap[payload.worktype]) {
   627вҶ’      // Not a corrective maintenance type, ignore
   628вҶ’      return;
   629вҶ’    }
   630вҶ’    
   631вҶ’    // Check if we already have an event for this WO
   632вҶ’    const existing = await this.db
   633вҶ’      .select()
   634вҶ’      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   635вҶ’      .where(and(
   636вҶ’        eq(unavailabilityEvents.sourceSystem, 'MAXIMO'),
   637вҶ’        eq(unavailabilityEvents.externalReference, payload.wonum)
   638вҶ’      ))
   639вҶ’      .limit(1);
   640вҶ’    
   641вҶ’    if (existing.length > 0) {
   642вҶ’      // Update existing event based on Maximo status
   643вҶ’      await this.updateFromMaximo(existing[0], payload);
   644вҶ’    } else if (payload.status === 'WAPPR' || payload.status === 'INPRG') {
   645вҶ’      // Create new unavailability event
   646вҶ’      const train = await this.findTrainByAssetnum(payload.assetnum);
   647вҶ’      if (!train) {
   648вҶ’        this.logger.warn({ assetnum: payload.assetnum }, 'Unknown asset in Maximo webhook');
   649вҶ’        return;
   650вҶ’      }
   651вҶ’      
   652вҶ’      await this.createEvent({
   653вҶ’        trainId: train.id,
   654вҶ’        eventType: eventTypeMap[payload.worktype],
   655вҶ’        restrictionLevel: 'GROUNDED',  // Default to grounded for CM
   656вҶ’        estimatedReturnDate: payload.schedfinish ? new Date(payload.schedfinish) : undefined,
   657вҶ’        sourceSystem: 'MAXIMO',
   658вҶ’        externalReference: payload.wonum,
   659вҶ’        description: payload.description
   660вҶ’      });
   661вҶ’    }
   662вҶ’  }
   663вҶ’  
   664вҶ’  private async updateFromMaximo(
   665вҶ’    event: UnavailabilityEvent, 
   666вҶ’    payload: MaximoWorkOrderWebhook
   667вҶ’  ): Promise<void> {
   668вҶ’    const maximoStatusMap: Record<string, 'ACTIVE' | 'RESOLVED'> = {
   669вҶ’      'WAPPR': 'ACTIVE',
   670вҶ’      'APPR': 'ACTIVE',
   671вҶ’      'INPRG': 'ACTIVE',
   672вҶ’      'COMP': 'RESOLVED',
   673вҶ’      'CLOSE': 'RESOLVED',
   674вҶ’      'CAN': 'RESOLVED'
   675вҶ’    };
   676вҶ’    
   677вҶ’    const newStatus = maximoStatusMap[payload.status] || 'ACTIVE';
   678вҶ’    
   679вҶ’    if (newStatus === 'RESOLVED' && event.status === 'ACTIVE') {
   680вҶ’      await this.resolveEvent(
   681вҶ’        event.id, 
   682вҶ’        new Date(), 
   683вҶ’        'SYSTEM_MAXIMO',
   684вҶ’        `Resolved via Maximo status: ${payload.status}`
   685вҶ’      );
   686вҶ’    } else {
   687вҶ’      // Update estimated return date if changed
   688вҶ’      await this.db
   689вҶ’        .update(unavailabilityEvents)
   690вҶ’        .set({
   691вҶ’          externalStatus: payload.status,
   692вҶ’          estimatedReturnDate: payload.schedfinish ? new Date(payload.schedfinish) : undefined,
   693вҶ’          updatedAt: new Date()
   694вҶ’        })
   695вҶ’        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, event.id));
   696вҶ’    }
   697вҶ’  }
   698вҶ’  
   699вҶ’  private async checkPMConflicts(
   700вҶ’    tx: Transaction,
   701вҶ’    trainId: string,
   702вҶ’    estimatedReturnDate?: Date
   703вҶ’  ): Promise<PMSchedule[]> {
   704вҶ’    const endDate = estimatedReturnDate || addDays(new Date(), 90); // Default 90 days
   705вҶ’    
   706вҶ’    return tx
   707вҶ’      .select()
   708вҶ’      .from(pmSchedule)
   709вҶ’      .where(and(
   710вҶ’        eq(pmSchedule.trainId, trainId),
   711вҶ’        eq(pmSchedule.status, 'SCHEDULED'),
   712вҶ’        lte(pmSchedule.targetDate, endDate),
   713вҶ’        isNull(pmSchedule.scenarioId)
   714вҶ’      ));
   715вҶ’  }
   716вҶ’}
   717вҶ’```
   718вҶ’
   719вҶ’---
   720вҶ’
   721вҶ’## 4.2.6 Service Demand Service (NEW v2.1)
   722вҶ’
   723вҶ’### 4.2.6.1 Purpose
   724вҶ’
   725вҶ’Manage fleet availability requirements by day type. This is a **hard constraint** for the optimizer - it cannot approve maintenance schedules that would violate minimum train availability.
   726вҶ’
   727вҶ’### 4.2.6.2 Implementation
   728вҶ’
   729вҶ’```typescript
   730вҶ’interface ServiceDemand {
   731вҶ’  id: string;
   732вҶ’  fleetId: string;
   733вҶ’  effectiveDate: Date;
   734вҶ’  dayType: 'WEEKDAY' | 'SATURDAY' | 'SUNDAY' | 'HOLIDAY';
   735вҶ’  
   736вҶ’  minTrainsRequired: number;
   737вҶ’  peakAmRequirement?: number;
   738вҶ’  middayRequirement?: number;
   739вҶ’  peakPmRequirement?: number;
   740вҶ’  standbyBuffer: number;
   741вҶ’}
   742вҶ’
   743вҶ’interface AvailabilityValidation {
   744вҶ’  isValid: boolean;
   745вҶ’  availableTrains: number;
   746вҶ’  requiredTrains: number;
   747вҶ’  shortfall: number;
   748вҶ’  unavailableTrains: string[];  // Train IDs
   749вҶ’  trainsInMaintenance: string[]; // Train IDs
   750вҶ’}
   751вҶ’
   752вҶ’class ServiceDemandService {
   753вҶ’  constructor(
   754вҶ’    private db: Database,
   755вҶ’    private unavailabilityService: UnavailabilityService
   756вҶ’  ) {}
   757вҶ’  
   758вҶ’  /**
   759вҶ’   * Get service demand for a specific date
   760вҶ’   */
   761вҶ’  async getDemand(fleetId: string, targetDate: Date): Promise<ServiceDemand> {
   762вҶ’    const dayType = this.getDayType(targetDate);
   763вҶ’    
   764вҶ’    const demand = await this.db
   765вҶ’      .select()
   766вҶ’      .from(serviceDemand)
   767вҶ’      .where(and(
   768вҶ’        eq(serviceDemand.fleetId, fleetId),
   769вҶ’        eq(serviceDemand.dayType, dayType),
   770вҶ’        lte(serviceDemand.effectiveDate, targetDate)
   771вҶ’      ))
   772вҶ’      .orderBy(desc(serviceDemand.effectiveDate))
   773вҶ’      .limit(1);
   774вҶ’    
   775вҶ’    if (demand.length === 0) {
   776вҶ’      // Return default: 85% of fleet
   777вҶ’      const fleetSize = await this.getFleetSize(fleetId);
   778вҶ’      return {
   779вҶ’        id: 'default',
   780вҶ’        fleetId,
   781вҶ’        effectiveDate: targetDate,
   782вҶ’        dayType,
   783вҶ’        minTrainsRequired: Math.ceil(fleetSize * 0.85),
   784вҶ’        standbyBuffer: 2
   785вҶ’      };
   786вҶ’    }
   787вҶ’    
   788вҶ’    return demand[0];
   789вҶ’  }
   790вҶ’  
   791вҶ’  /**
   792вҶ’   * Validate that enough trains will be available on a date
   793вҶ’   */
   794вҶ’  async validateAvailability(
   795вҶ’    fleetId: string, 
   796вҶ’    targetDate: Date,
   797вҶ’    additionalUnavailable: string[] = []  // Train IDs to exclude (e.g., proposed PM)
   798вҶ’  ): Promise<AvailabilityValidation> {
   799вҶ’    const demand = await this.getDemand(fleetId, targetDate);
   800вҶ’

ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвӮ¬ЕЎ   ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвӮ¬ВқГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГӢЕ“     ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвӮ¬ВқГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГӢЕ“     ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвӮ¬ВқГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвҖҡВ¬ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГӢЕ“          ГғВўГўвӮ¬ВқГўвӮ¬ЕЎ

## 4.2 Ingestion Service

### 4.2.1 Purpose

Process daily CSV files containing mileage data, validate records, handle meter events, and update the database.

### 4.2.2 File Watcher

```typescript
interface FileWatcherConfig {
  inboxPath: string;           // /data/inbox
  processedPath: string;       // /data/processed
  quarantinePath: string;      // /data/quarantine
  expectedFilePattern: RegExp; // /^mileage_\d{8}\.csv$/
  maxFileSizeBytes: number;    // 10MB
  alertThresholdHours: number; // 2
}

class FileWatcherService {
  private watcher: FSWatcher;
  private lastFileReceivedAt: Date | null = null;
  
  async start(): Promise<void> {
    this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.config.inboxPath, {
      persistent: true,
      awaitWriteFinish: { stabilityThreshold: 2000, pollInterval: 500 }
    });
    
    this.watcher.on('add', async (filePath) => {
      this.lastFileReceivedAt = new Date();
      await this.processFile(filePath);
    });
    
    // Health check interval
    setInterval(() => this.checkFileArrivalHealth(), 30 * 60 * 1000);
  }
  
  private async processFile(filePath: string): Promise<void> {
    const filename = path.basename(filePath);
    const jobId = crypto.randomUUID();
    
    try {
      // Validate file
      await this.validateFile(filePath);
      
      // Queue for processing
      await this.jobQueue.add('ingestion', {
        jobId,
        filePath,
        filename,
        receivedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      }, {
        attempts: 3,
        backoff: { type: 'exponential', delay: 5000 }
      });
      
      this.logger.info({ jobId, filename }, 'File queued for ingestion');
      
    } catch (error) {
      // Move to quarantine
      const quarantinePath = path.join(
        this.config.quarantinePath, 
        `${Date.now()}_${filename}`
      );
      await fs.rename(filePath, quarantinePath);
      
      this.logger.error({ filename, error }, 'File quarantined');
      
      await this.alertService.send({
        type: 'FILE_VALIDATION_FAILED',
        severity: 'WARNING',
        message: `File ${filename} failed validation: ${error.message}`,
        filePath: quarantinePath
      });
    }
  }
  
  private async validateFile(filePath: string): Promise<void> {
    const stats = await fs.stat(filePath);
    
    // Size check
    if (stats.size > this.config.maxFileSizeBytes) {
      throw new Error(`File exceeds maximum size: ${stats.size} bytes`);
    }
    
    // Format check
    const filename = path.basename(filePath);
    if (!this.config.expectedFilePattern.test(filename)) {
      throw new Error(`Filename does not match expected pattern: ${filename}`);
    }
    
    // Content check (first 10 lines)
    const sample = await this.readFirstLines(filePath, 10);
    await this.validateCSVStructure(sample);
  }
  
  private async checkFileArrivalHealth(): Promise<void> {
    if (!this.lastFileReceivedAt) return;
    
    const hoursSinceLastFile = 
      (Date.now() - this.lastFileReceivedAt.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
    
    if (hoursSinceLastFile > this.config.alertThresholdHours) {
      await this.alertService.send({
        type: 'FILE_ARRIVAL_DELAYED',
        severity: 'WARNING',
        message: `No mileage files received in ${hoursSinceLastFile.toFixed(1)} hours`,
        lastFileAt: this.lastFileReceivedAt.toISOString(),
        expectedInterval: `${this.config.alertThresholdHours} hours`
      });
    }
  }
}
```

### 4.2.3 Ingestion Worker

```typescript
interface MileageRecord {
  trainNumber: string;
  readingDate: string;  // YYYY-MM-DD
  odometerValue: number;
  source?: string;
}

interface IngestionResult {
  jobId: string;
  filename: string;
  totalRecords: number;
  validRecords: number;
  invalidRecords: number;
  anomalies: AnomalyRecord[];
  meterEvents: MeterEventRecord[];
  processingTimeMs: number;
}

class IngestionWorker {
  async process(job: Job<IngestionJobData>): Promise<IngestionResult> {
    const startTime = Date.now();
    const { jobId, filePath, filename } = job.data;
    
    const result: IngestionResult = {
      jobId,
      filename,
      totalRecords: 0,
      validRecords: 0,
      invalidRecords: 0,
      anomalies: [],
      meterEvents: [],
      processingTimeMs: 0
    };
    
    // Parse CSV
    const records = await this.parseCSV(filePath);
    result.totalRecords = records.length;
    
    // Process in batches
    const batches = this.chunk(records, 100);
    
    for (const batch of batches) {
      await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
        for (const record of batch) {
          try {
            await this.processRecord(tx, record, result);
            result.validRecords++;
          } catch (error) {
            result.invalidRecords++;
            this.logger.warn({ record, error }, 'Record processing failed');
          }
        }
      });
    }
    
    // Move file to processed
    const processedPath = path.join(
      this.config.processedPath,
      `${Date.now()}_${filename}`
    );
    await fs.rename(filePath, processedPath);
    
    // Update train current mileage
    await this.updateTrainMileage(records);
    
    // Trigger downstream processing
    await this.triggerDriftCheck();
    
    result.processingTimeMs = Date.now() - startTime;
    
    return result;
  }
  
  private async processRecord(
    tx: Transaction,
    record: MileageRecord,
    result: IngestionResult
  ): Promise<void> {
    // Find train
    const train = await tx.query.trains.findFirst({
      where: eq(trains.trainNumber, record.trainNumber)
    });
    
    if (!train) {
      throw new Error(`Unknown train: ${record.trainNumber}`);
    }
    
    // Get previous reading
    const previousReading = await tx.query.mileageReadings.findFirst({
      where: and(
        eq(mileageReadings.trainId, train.id),
        lt(mileageReadings.readingDate, record.readingDate)
      ),
      orderBy: desc(mileageReadings.readingDate)
    });
    
    // Calculate adjusted value (handle meter events)
    const adjustment = await this.getMeterAdjustment(tx, train.id, record.readingDate);
    const adjustedReading = record.odometerValue + adjustment;
    
    // Calculate daily km
    let dailyKm: number | null = null;
    let anomalyType: string | null = null;
    
    if (previousReading) {
      dailyKm = adjustedReading - previousReading.adjustedReading;
      
      // Anomaly detection
      if (dailyKm < 0) {
        anomalyType = 'NEGATIVE';
        result.anomalies.push({
          trainNumber: record.trainNumber,
          date: record.readingDate,
          type: 'NEGATIVE',
          value: dailyKm,
          message: `Negative daily mileage: ${dailyKm} km`
        });
      } else if (dailyKm > 1000) {  // Spike threshold
        anomalyType = 'SPIKE';
        result.anomalies.push({
          trainNumber: record.trainNumber,
          date: record.readingDate,
          type: 'SPIKE',
          value: dailyKm,
          message: `Unusually high daily mileage: ${dailyKm} km`
        });
      }
    }
    
    // Insert or update reading
    await tx.insert(mileageReadings)
      .values({
        trainId: train.id,
        readingDate: record.readingDate,
        rawReading: record.odometerValue,
        adjustedReading,
        dailyKm,
        validationStatus: anomalyType ? 'ANOMALY' : 'VALID',
        anomalyType,
        sourceFile: result.filename
      })
      .onConflictDoUpdate({
        target: [mileageReadings.trainId, mileageReadings.readingDate],
        set: {
          rawReading: record.odometerValue,
          adjustedReading,
          dailyKm,
          validationStatus: anomalyType ? 'ANOMALY' : 'VALID',
          anomalyType,
          sourceFile: result.filename
        }
      });
  }
  
  private async getMeterAdjustment(
    tx: Transaction,
    trainId: string,
    asOfDate: string
  ): Promise<number> {
    // Sum all meter event adjustments up to this date
    const events = await tx.query.meterEvents.findMany({
      where: and(
        eq(meterEvents.trainId, trainId),
        lte(meterEvents.eventDate, asOfDate)
      )
    });
    
    return events.reduce((sum, e) => sum + (e.adjustmentKm || 0), 0);
  }
  
  private async updateTrainMileage(records: MileageRecord[]): Promise<void> {
    // Group by train, find latest reading
    const latestByTrain = new Map<string, MileageRecord>();
    
    for (const record of records) {
      const existing = latestByTrain.get(record.trainNumber);
      if (!existing || record.readingDate > existing.readingDate) {
        latestByTrain.set(record.trainNumber, record);
      }
    }
    
    // Update train current_mileage
    for (const [trainNumber, record] of latestByTrain) {
      await this.db.update(trains)
        .set({ 
          currentMileageKm: record.odometerValue,
          updatedAt: new Date()
        })
        .where(eq(trains.trainNumber, trainNumber));
    }
    
    // Update fleet mileage targets
    await this.db.execute(sql`SELECT update_fleet_mileage_targets()`);
  }
}
```

## 4.2.5 Unavailability Service (NEW v2.1)

### 4.2.5.1 Purpose

Track trains that are unavailable due to corrective maintenance, incidents, or other blocking factors. This service is **critical** for schedule validity - without it, the optimizer can schedule PMs for trains that are grounded for weeks.

### 4.2.5.2 Implementation

```typescript
interface UnavailabilityEvent {
  id: string;
  trainId: string;
  eventType: 'CORRECTIVE' | 'INCIDENT' | 'COLLISION' | 'VANDALISM' | 'EXTERNAL' | 'PLANNED_OUTAGE';
  status: 'ACTIVE' | 'RESOLVED';
  restrictionLevel: 'RESTRICTED' | 'GROUNDED';
  
  reportedAt: Date;
  estimatedRepairHours?: number;
  estimatedReturnDate?: Date;
  actualReturnDate?: Date;
  
  sourceSystem: 'MAXIMO' | 'OCC' | 'MANUAL';
  externalReference?: string;   // Maximo WO number
  externalStatus?: string;      // Maximo status
  
  description?: string;
  failureCode?: string;
  affectedSystem?: string;
  
  blocksPmScheduling: boolean;
  blocksRunAssignment: boolean;
}

interface CreateUnavailabilityInput {
  trainId: string;
  eventType: UnavailabilityEvent['eventType'];
  restrictionLevel: UnavailabilityEvent['restrictionLevel'];
  estimatedReturnDate?: Date;
  estimatedRepairHours?: number;
  sourceSystem: UnavailabilityEvent['sourceSystem'];
  externalReference?: string;
  description?: string;
  affectedSystem?: string;
}

class UnavailabilityService {
  constructor(
    private db: Database,
    private alertService: AlertService,
    private auditService: AuditService
  ) {}
  
  /**
   * Create a new unavailability event (e.g., from Maximo webhook)
   */
  async createEvent(input: CreateUnavailabilityInput, userId?: string): Promise<UnavailabilityEvent> {
    const event = await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
      // 1. Create the unavailability event
      const [newEvent] = await tx
        .insert(unavailabilityEvents)
        .values({
          ...input,
          status: 'ACTIVE',
          reportedAt: new Date(),
          blocksPmScheduling: true,
          blocksRunAssignment: input.restrictionLevel === 'GROUNDED',
        })
        .returning();
      
      // 2. Update train fitness status (trigger handles this, but we can be explicit)
      await tx
        .update(trains)
        .set({
          fitnessStatus: input.restrictionLevel,
          fitnessNotes: input.description || `Unavailability: ${input.eventType}`,
          updatedAt: new Date()
        })
        .where(eq(trains.id, input.trainId));
      
      // 3. Check for conflicts with scheduled PMs
      const conflicts = await this.checkPMConflicts(tx, input.trainId, input.estimatedReturnDate);
      
      return { event: newEvent, conflicts };
    });
    
    // Alert if PM conflicts exist
    if (event.conflicts.length > 0) {
      await this.alertService.send({
        type: 'UNAVAILABILITY_PM_CONFLICT',
        severity: 'WARNING',
        message: `Train ${event.event.trainId} unavailable - ${event.conflicts.length} scheduled PMs may be affected`,
        data: {
          trainId: event.event.trainId,
          eventId: event.event.id,
          conflictingPMs: event.conflicts.map(pm => ({
            pmId: pm.id,
            pmType: pm.pmTypeCode,
            targetDate: pm.targetDate
          }))
        }
      });
    }
    
    // Audit log
    await this.auditService.log({
      entityType: 'unavailability_event',
      entityId: event.event.id,
      action: 'CREATE',
      userId,
      newValues: event.event
    });
    
    return event.event;
  }
  
  /**
   * Resolve an unavailability event (train returns to service)
   */
  async resolveEvent(
    eventId: string, 
    actualReturnDate: Date, 
    userId: string,
    notes?: string
  ): Promise<void> {
    await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
      const [event] = await tx
        .select()
        .from(unavailabilityEvents)
        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId));
      
      if (!event) {
        throw new NotFoundError(`Unavailability event ${eventId} not found`);
      }
      
      if (event.status === 'RESOLVED') {
        throw new ConflictError('Event already resolved');
      }
      
      // Update the event
      await tx
        .update(unavailabilityEvents)
        .set({
          status: 'RESOLVED',
          actualReturnDate,
          resolvedAt: new Date(),
          resolvedBy: userId,
          resolutionNotes: notes,
          updatedAt: new Date()
        })
        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId));
      
      // Check if there are other active unavailability events for this train
      const otherActive = await tx
        .select({ count: count() })
        .from(unavailabilityEvents)
        .where(and(
          eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, event.trainId),
          eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'),
          ne(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId)
        ));
      
      // If no other active events, restore train to FIT
      if (otherActive[0].count === 0) {
        await tx
          .update(trains)
          .set({
            fitnessStatus: 'FIT',
            fitnessNotes: null,
            updatedAt: new Date()
          })
          .where(eq(trains.id, event.trainId));
      }
    });
    
    await this.auditService.log({
      entityType: 'unavailability_event',
      entityId: eventId,
      action: 'RESOLVE',
      userId,
      newValues: { status: 'RESOLVED', actualReturnDate }
    });
  }
  
  /**
   * Get all active unavailability events (for optimizer input)
   */
  async getActiveUnavailability(depotId?: string): Promise<UnavailabilityEvent[]> {
    let query = this.db
      .select({
        event: unavailabilityEvents,
        train: {
          trainNumber: trains.trainNumber,
          fleetId: trains.fleetId,
          currentDepotId: trains.currentDepotId
        }
      })
      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
      .innerJoin(trains, eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, trains.id))
      .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'));
    
    if (depotId) {
      query = query.where(eq(trains.currentDepotId, depotId));
    }
    
    const results = await query;
    return results.map(r => ({
      ...r.event,
      trainNumber: r.train.trainNumber,
      fleetId: r.train.fleetId
    }));
  }
  
  /**
   * Check if a specific train is available on a specific date
   */
  async isTrainAvailable(trainId: string, targetDate: Date): Promise<{
    available: boolean;
    blockingEvent?: UnavailabilityEvent;
  }> {
    const activeEvents = await this.db
      .select()
      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
      .where(and(
        eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, trainId),
        eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'),
        or(
          isNull(unavailabilityEvents.estimatedReturnDate),
          gte(unavailabilityEvents.estimatedReturnDate, targetDate)
        )
      ))
      .limit(1);
    
    if (activeEvents.length > 0) {
      return { available: false, blockingEvent: activeEvents[0] };
    }
    
    return { available: true };
  }
  
  /**
   * Process Maximo webhook for work order status change
   */
  async processMaximoWebhook(payload: MaximoWorkOrderWebhook): Promise<void> {
    // Map Maximo work types to our event types
    const eventTypeMap: Record<string, UnavailabilityEvent['eventType']> = {
      'CM': 'CORRECTIVE',
      'EM': 'CORRECTIVE',  // Emergency maintenance
      'IN': 'INCIDENT'
    };
    
    if (!eventTypeMap[payload.worktype]) {
      // Not a corrective maintenance type, ignore
      return;
    }
    
    // Check if we already have an event for this WO
    const existing = await this.db
      .select()
      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
      .where(and(
        eq(unavailabilityEvents.sourceSystem, 'MAXIMO'),
        eq(unavailabilityEvents.externalReference, payload.wonum)
      ))
      .limit(1);
    
    if (existing.length > 0) {
      // Update existing event based on Maximo status
      await this.updateFromMaximo(existing[0], payload);
    } else if (payload.status === 'WAPPR' || payload.status === 'INPRG') {
      // Create new unavailability event
      const train = await this.findTrainByAssetnum(payload.assetnum);
      if (!train) {
        this.logger.warn({ assetnum: payload.assetnum }, 'Unknown asset in Maximo webhook');
        return;
      }
      
      await this.createEvent({
        trainId: train.id,
        eventType: eventTypeMap[payload.worktype],
        restrictionLevel: 'GROUNDED',  // Default to grounded for CM
        estimatedReturnDate: payload.schedfinish ? new Date(payload.schedfinish) : undefined,
        sourceSystem: 'MAXIMO',
        externalReference: payload.wonum,
        description: payload.description
      });
    }
  }
  
  private async updateFromMaximo(
    event: UnavailabilityEvent, 
    payload: MaximoWorkOrderWebhook
  ): Promise<void> {
    const maximoStatusMap: Record<string, 'ACTIVE' | 'RESOLVED'> = {
      'WAPPR': 'ACTIVE',
      'APPR': 'ACTIVE',
      'INPRG': 'ACTIVE',
      'COMP': 'RESOLVED',
      'CLOSE': 'RESOLVED',
      'CAN': 'RESOLVED'
    };
    
    const newStatus = maximoStatusMap[payload.status] || 'ACTIVE';
    
    if (newStatus === 'RESOLVED' && event.status === 'ACTIVE') {
      await this.resolveEvent(
        event.id, 
        new Date(), 
        'SYSTEM_MAXIMO',
        `Resolved via Maximo status: ${payload.status}`
      );
    } else {
      // Update estimated return date if changed
      await this.db
        .update(unavailabilityEvents)
        .set({
          externalStatus: payload.status,
          estimatedReturnDate: payload.schedfinish ? new Date(payload.schedfinish) : undefined,
          updatedAt: new Date()
        })
        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, event.id));
    }
  }
  
  private async checkPMConflicts(
    tx: Transaction,
    trainId: string,
    estimatedReturnDate?: Date
  ): Promise<PMSchedule[]> {
    const endDate = estimatedReturnDate || addDays(new Date(), 90); // Default 90 days
    
    return tx
      .select()
      .from(pmSchedule)
      .where(and(
        eq(pmSchedule.trainId, trainId),
        eq(pmSchedule.status, 'SCHEDULED'),
        lte(pmSchedule.targetDate, endDate),
        isNull(pmSchedule.scenarioId)
      ));
  }
}
```

## 4.2.6 Service Demand Service (NEW v2.1)

### 4.2.6.1 Purpose

Manage fleet availability requirements by day type. This is a **hard constraint** for the optimizer - it cannot approve maintenance schedules that would violate minimum train availability.

### 4.2.6.2 Implementation

```typescript
interface ServiceDemand {
  id: string;
  fleetId: string;
  effectiveDate: Date;
  dayType: 'WEEKDAY' | 'SATURDAY' | 'SUNDAY' | 'HOLIDAY';
  
  minTrainsRequired: number;
  peakAmRequirement?: number;
  middayRequirement?: number;
  peakPmRequirement?: number;
  standbyBuffer: number;
}

interface AvailabilityValidation {
  isValid: boolean;
  availableTrains: number;
  requiredTrains: number;
  shortfall: number;
  unavailableTrains: string[];  // Train IDs
  trainsInMaintenance: string[]; // Train IDs
}

class ServiceDemandService {
  constructor(
    private db: Database,
    private unavailabilityService: UnavailabilityService
  ) {}
  
  /**
   * Get service demand for a specific date
   */
  async getDemand(fleetId: string, targetDate: Date): Promise<ServiceDemand> {
    const dayType = this.getDayType(targetDate);
    
    const demand = await this.db
      .select()
      .from(serviceDemand)
      .where(and(
        eq(serviceDemand.fleetId, fleetId),
        eq(serviceDemand.dayType, dayType),
        lte(serviceDemand.effectiveDate, targetDate)
      ))
      .orderBy(desc(serviceDemand.effectiveDate))
      .limit(1);
    
    if (demand.length === 0) {
      // Return default: 85% of fleet
      const fleetSize = await this.getFleetSize(fleetId);
      return {
        id: 'default',
        fleetId,
        effectiveDate: targetDate,
        dayType,
        minTrainsRequired: Math.ceil(fleetSize * 0.85),
        standbyBuffer: 2
      };
    }
    
    return demand[0];
  }
  
  /**
   * Validate that enough trains will be available on a date
   */
  async validateAvailability(
    fleetId: string, 
    targetDate: Date,
    additionalUnavailable: string[] = []  // Train IDs to exclude (e.g., proposed PM)

   221вҶ’ГўвҖқвҖқГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқЛң
   222вҶ’```
   223вҶ’
   224вҶ’### 6.3.5 Hybrid Rendering Architecture
   225вҶ’
   226вҶ’**CRITICAL:** The canvas uses **hybrid rendering** to optimize for each zoom level:
   227вҶ’
   228вҶ’| Zoom Level | Renderer | Rationale |
   229вҶ’|------------|----------|-----------|
   230вҶ’| Strategic (0-4) | **deck.gl (WebGL)** | Heatmap cells, no text needed |
   231вҶ’| Tactical-Wide (4-8) | **deck.gl (WebGL)** | Compressed blocks, minimal text |
   232вҶ’| Tactical (8-12) | **Konva (HTML5 Canvas)** | Gantt bars with crisp text labels |
   233вҶ’| Operational (12-16) | **Konva (HTML5 Canvas)** | Detailed cards with readable text |
   234вҶ’| Detail (16-20) | **React DOM** | Rich interactions, form inputs |
   235вҶ’
   236вҶ’**Why Hybrid?**
   237вҶ’
   238вҶ’deck.gl uses WebGL for rendering, which has limitations for text-heavy views:
   239вҶ’- Font atlases blur during zoom operations
   240вҶ’- Hit-testing for drag-and-drop is complex in WebGL
   241вҶ’- Text rendering feels less crisp than native canvas/DOM
   242вҶ’
   243вҶ’By switching to Konva (HTML5 Canvas 2D) at tactical zoom levels, we get:
   244вҶ’- Crisp text rendering at all scales
   245вҶ’- Native canvas hit-testing for smooth drag-and-drop
   246вҶ’- Better performance for hundreds of labeled PM blocks
   247вҶ’
   248вҶ’```typescript
   249вҶ’interface CanvasLayers {
   250вҶ’  // === DECK.GL LAYERS (Strategic/Overview) ===
   251вҶ’  // Used for zoom levels 0-8 where text is minimal
   252вҶ’  
   253вҶ’  strategicHeatmapLayer: HeatmapLayer;    // PM density heatmap
   254вҶ’  timelineAxisLayer: LineLayer;            // Time axis lines
   255вҶ’  quarterBoundaryLayer: LineLayer;         // Quarter separators
   256вҶ’  
   257вҶ’  // === KONVA LAYERS (Tactical/Operational) ===
   258вҶ’  // Used for zoom levels 8-16 where text labels are critical
   259вҶ’  
   260вҶ’  ganttBlockLayer: Konva.Layer;            // PM blocks with labels
   261вҶ’  constraintWallLayer: Konva.Layer;        // Compliance windows
   262вҶ’  trainLabelLayer: Konva.Layer;            // Train number labels
   263вҶ’  tooltipLayer: Konva.Layer;               // Hover tooltips
   264вҶ’  dragPreviewLayer: Konva.Layer;           // Drag-and-drop preview
   265вҶ’  
   266вҶ’  // === REACT DOM OVERLAY (Detail) ===
   267вҶ’  // Used for zoom level 16+ where rich interactions needed
   268вҶ’  
   269вҶ’  detailCardOverlay: React.ReactNode;      // Expanded PM cards
   270вҶ’  editFormOverlay: React.ReactNode;        // Inline editing
   271вҶ’}
   272вҶ’
   273вҶ’// Layer visibility by zoom level
   274вҶ’function getActiveRenderer(zoom: number): 'deckgl' | 'konva' | 'react' {
   275вҶ’  if (zoom < 8) return 'deckgl';
   276вҶ’  if (zoom < 16) return 'konva';
   277вҶ’  return 'react';
   278вҶ’}
   279вҶ’```
   280вҶ’
   281вҶ’**Transition Handling:**
   282вҶ’
   283вҶ’When crossing renderer boundaries, animate opacity to avoid jarring switches:
   284вҶ’
   285вҶ’```typescript
   286вҶ’function handleZoomChange(prevZoom: number, newZoom: number): void {
   287вҶ’  const prevRenderer = getActiveRenderer(prevZoom);
   288вҶ’  const newRenderer = getActiveRenderer(newZoom);
   289вҶ’  
   290вҶ’  if (prevRenderer !== newRenderer) {
   291вҶ’    // Cross-fade over 200ms
   292вҶ’    animateOpacity(prevRenderer, 1, 0, 200);
   293вҶ’    animateOpacity(newRenderer, 0, 1, 200);
   294вҶ’  }
   295вҶ’}
   296вҶ’```
   297вҶ’
   298вҶ’### 6.3.6 Zoom and Pan Controls
   299вҶ’
   300вҶ’```typescript
   301вҶ’interface CanvasViewState {
   302вҶ’  // Viewport
   303вҶ’  longitude: number;    // Time position (days from epoch)
   304вҶ’  latitude: number;     // Train index position
   305вҶ’  zoom: number;         // Zoom level (0-20)
   306вҶ’  
   307вҶ’  // Derived
   308вҶ’  timeRange: {
   309вҶ’    start: Date;
   310вҶ’    end: Date;
   311вҶ’  };
   312вҶ’  visibleTrains: string[];
   313вҶ’  zoomLevel: 'STRATEGIC' | 'TACTICAL_WIDE' | 'TACTICAL' | 'OPERATIONAL' | 'DETAIL';
   314вҶ’  activeRenderer: 'deckgl' | 'konva' | 'react';  // Current rendering mode
   315вҶ’}
   316вҶ’
   317вҶ’// Zoom level thresholds
   318вҶ’const ZOOM_THRESHOLDS = {
   319вҶ’  STRATEGIC: { min: 0, max: 4, renderer: 'deckgl' },
   320вҶ’  TACTICAL_WIDE: { min: 4, max: 8, renderer: 'deckgl' },
   321вҶ’  TACTICAL: { min: 8, max: 12, renderer: 'konva' },
   322вҶ’  OPERATIONAL: { min: 12, max: 16, renderer: 'konva' },
   323вҶ’  DETAIL: { min: 16, max: 20, renderer: 'react' }
   324вҶ’};
   325вҶ’
   326вҶ’// Keyboard shortcuts
   327вҶ’const KEYBOARD_SHORTCUTS = {
   328вҶ’  '+': 'Zoom in',
   329вҶ’  '-': 'Zoom out',
   330вҶ’  't': 'Go to today',
   331вҶ’  's': 'Strategic view',
   332вҶ’  'o': 'Operational view',
   333вҶ’  'Escape': 'Deselect',
   334вҶ’  'Delete': 'Cancel selected PM (with confirmation)',
   335вҶ’  'l': 'Lock/unlock selected PM'
   336вҶ’};
   337вҶ’```
   338вҶ’
   339вҶ’---
   340вҶ’
   341вҶ’## 6.4 Drag-and-Drop Interaction
   342вҶ’
   343вҶ’### 6.4.1 PM Rescheduling Flow
   344вҶ’
   345вҶ’```
   346вҶ’User Action                     System Response
   347вҶ’ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬ГўвҖқвӮ¬
   348вҶ’1. Hover over PM block         ГўвҖ вҖҷ Cursor changes to grab
   349вҶ’                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ Block highlights
   350вҶ’                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ Tooltip shows PM details
   351вҶ’
   352вҶ’2. Mouse down on PM block      ГўвҖ вҖҷ Block enters "dragging" state
   353вҶ’                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ Constraint walls become prominent
   354вҶ’                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ Other PMs fade slightly
   355вҶ’
   356вҶ’3. Drag PM to new position     ГўвҖ вҖҷ Ghost preview follows cursor
   357вҶ’                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ Real-time validation:
   358вҶ’                                 - Green outline = valid drop
   359вҶ’                                 - Red outline = constraint violation
   360вҶ’                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ Violation tooltip explains issue
   361вҶ’
   362вҶ’4. Release over valid position ГўвҖ вҖҷ Confirmation dialog:
   363вҶ’                                 "Move C2 for Train 1001 from
   364вҶ’                                  Feb 15 to Feb 20?"
   365вҶ’                                 [Cancel] [Confirm]
   366вҶ’
   367вҶ’5. User confirms               ГўвҖ вҖҷ API call to update PM
   368вҶ’                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ WebSocket broadcasts change
   369вҶ’                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ All connected clients update
   370вҶ’                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ History entry created
   371вҶ’                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ Success toast notification
   372вҶ’
   373вҶ’6. Release over invalid        ГўвҖ вҖҷ PM snaps back to original
   374вҶ’   position                    ГўвҖ вҖҷ Error toast explains violation
   375вҶ’```
   376вҶ’
   377вҶ’### 6.4.2 Constraint Violation Feedback

# Metro Fleet Mileage Management System
# Part 6: User Interface Specification

**Document Version:** 2.0  
**Status:** APPROVED FOR DEVELOPMENT

---

## 6.1 Design System Overview

### 6.1.1 Technology Stack

| Component | Technology | Purpose |
|-----------|------------|---------|
| Framework | React 18 | Component architecture |
| State | Zustand | Global state management |
| Canvas | deck.gl | WebGL timeline rendering |
| Components | BlueprintJS v6 | UI component library |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS | Utility-first styling |
| Build | Vite | Development and bundling |
| Types | TypeScript | Type safety |

### 6.1.2 Design Principles

1. **Information Density**: Maximize data visibility without overwhelming
2. **Semantic Zoom**: Data representation adapts to zoom level
3. **Direct Manipulation**: Drag-and-drop with immediate feedback
4. **Progressive Disclosure**: Details on demand
5. **Constraint Visibility**: Show limits, not just violations
6. **Explainability**: Every system decision has visible rationale

### 6.1.3 Color System

```typescript
const colors = {
  // PM Status
  pm: {
    scheduled: '#3B82F6',    // Blue
    inProgress: '#F59E0B',   // Amber
    completed: '#10B981',    // Green
    cancelled: '#6B7280',    // Gray
    deferred: '#8B5CF6',     // Purple
    overdue: '#EF4444',      // Red
  },
  
  // Constraint Indicators
  constraints: {
    hardViolation: '#DC2626',    // Red-600
    softViolation: '#F59E0B',    // Amber-500
    approaching: '#FBBF24',      // Yellow-400
    ok: '#10B981',               // Green-500
  },
  
  // Drift Severity
  drift: {
    critical: '#DC2626',     // Red
    warning: '#F59E0B',      // Amber
    ok: '#10B981',           // Green
  },
  
  // Utilization
  utilization: {
    overloaded: '#DC2626',   // Red
    optimal: '#10B981',      // Green
    underutilized: '#3B82F6', // Blue
  },
  
  // Fleet Colors
  fleets: {
    KS: '#0EA5E9',           // Sky-500
    ALSTOM: '#8B5CF6',       // Violet-500
  }
};
```

---

## 6.2 Application Layout

```

### 6.3.5 Hybrid Rendering Architecture

**CRITICAL:** The canvas uses **hybrid rendering** to optimize for each zoom level:

| Zoom Level | Renderer | Rationale |
|------------|----------|-----------|
| Strategic (0-4) | **deck.gl (WebGL)** | Heatmap cells, no text needed |
| Tactical-Wide (4-8) | **deck.gl (WebGL)** | Compressed blocks, minimal text |
| Tactical (8-12) | **Konva (HTML5 Canvas)** | Gantt bars with crisp text labels |
| Operational (12-16) | **Konva (HTML5 Canvas)** | Detailed cards with readable text |
| Detail (16-20) | **React DOM** | Rich interactions, form inputs |

**Why Hybrid?**

deck.gl uses WebGL for rendering, which has limitations for text-heavy views:
- Font atlases blur during zoom operations
- Hit-testing for drag-and-drop is complex in WebGL
- Text rendering feels less crisp than native canvas/DOM

By switching to Konva (HTML5 Canvas 2D) at tactical zoom levels, we get:
- Crisp text rendering at all scales
- Native canvas hit-testing for smooth drag-and-drop
- Better performance for hundreds of labeled PM blocks

```typescript
interface CanvasLayers {
  // === DECK.GL LAYERS (Strategic/Overview) ===
  // Used for zoom levels 0-8 where text is minimal
  
  strategicHeatmapLayer: HeatmapLayer;    // PM density heatmap
  timelineAxisLayer: LineLayer;            // Time axis lines
  quarterBoundaryLayer: LineLayer;         // Quarter separators
  
  // === KONVA LAYERS (Tactical/Operational) ===
  // Used for zoom levels 8-16 where text labels are critical
  
  ganttBlockLayer: Konva.Layer;            // PM blocks with labels
  constraintWallLayer: Konva.Layer;        // Compliance windows
  trainLabelLayer: Konva.Layer;            // Train number labels
  tooltipLayer: Konva.Layer;               // Hover tooltips
  dragPreviewLayer: Konva.Layer;           // Drag-and-drop preview
  
  // === REACT DOM OVERLAY (Detail) ===
  // Used for zoom level 16+ where rich interactions needed
  
  detailCardOverlay: React.ReactNode;      // Expanded PM cards
  editFormOverlay: React.ReactNode;        // Inline editing
}

// Layer visibility by zoom level
function getActiveRenderer(zoom: number): 'deckgl' | 'konva' | 'react' {
  if (zoom < 8) return 'deckgl';
  if (zoom < 16) return 'konva';
  return 'react';
}
```

**Transition Handling:**

When crossing renderer boundaries, animate opacity to avoid jarring switches:

```typescript
function handleZoomChange(prevZoom: number, newZoom: number): void {
  const prevRenderer = getActiveRenderer(prevZoom);
  const newRenderer = getActiveRenderer(newZoom);
  
  if (prevRenderer !== newRenderer) {
    // Cross-fade over 200ms
    animateOpacity(prevRenderer, 1, 0, 200);
    animateOpacity(newRenderer, 0, 1, 200);
  }
}
```

interface CanvasViewState {

  // Derived

};

1. Hover over PM block         ГўвҖ вҖҷ Cursor changes to grab
                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ Block highlights
                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ Tooltip shows PM details

2. Mouse down on PM block      ГўвҖ вҖҷ Block enters "dragging" state
                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ Constraint walls become prominent
                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ Other PMs fade slightly

3. Drag PM to new position     ГўвҖ вҖҷ Ghost preview follows cursor
                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ Real-time validation:
                                 - Green outline = valid drop
                                 - Red outline = constraint violation
                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ Violation tooltip explains issue

4. Release over valid position ГўвҖ вҖҷ Confirmation dialog:
                                 "Move C2 for Train 1001 from
                                  Feb 15 to Feb 20?"
                                 [Cancel] [Confirm]

5. User confirms               ГўвҖ вҖҷ API call to update PM
                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ WebSocket broadcasts change
                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ All connected clients update
                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ History entry created
                               ГўвҖ вҖҷ Success toast notification

6. Release over invalid        ГўвҖ вҖҷ PM snaps back to original
   position                    ГўвҖ вҖҷ Error toast explains violation
```

```typescript
type ToastType = 'success' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'info';

interface Toast {
  id: string;
  type: ToastType;
  title: string;
  message?: string;
  action?: {
    label: string;
    onClick: () => void;
  };
  duration: number;  // ms, 0 = persistent
}

// Examples
const TOAST_EXAMPLES = {
  pmMoved: {
    type: 'success',
    title: 'PM Rescheduled',
    message: 'Train 1001 C2 moved from Feb 15 to Feb 20',
    duration: 5000
  },
  optimizerComplete: {
    type: 'info',
    title: 'Optimization Complete',
    message: '45 trains assigned, 3 unassigned',
    action: { label: 'View Results', onClick: () => {} },
    duration: 0  // Persistent until dismissed
  },
  constraintViolation: {
    type: 'error',
    title: 'Cannot Move PM',
    message: 'Track T1 is occupied by another PM on this date',
    duration: 8000
  },
  driftAlert: {
    type: 'warning',
    title: 'Drift Alert',
    message: '3 trains require replanning attention',
    action: { label: 'View Details', onClick: () => {} },
    duration: 0
  }
};
```

### 6.8.2 Alert Banner

For system-wide alerts:

```
